concept: Velocity-One: A high-performance, command-center task engine. Designed for frictionless task ingestion and cognitive load management. Uses extreme high-contrast minimalist dark UI to eliminate distraction. Data is treated as instrumentation.

mono.usage: Velocity scores, algorithm weights, streak counters

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
layout_and_spacing.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6 for standard cards; p-8 for feature panels. Ample breathing room inside containers.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align forms, data, and dense content. Center only explicit empty states or hero text.

surfaces_and_borders.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-[#141414]), 1px solid border (border-[#2A2A2A]), no drop shadows. Strictly geometric.
surfaces_and_borders.active_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-[2px]) and border color shift to border-[#FF5500]/50.
surfaces_and_borders.header: Solid background (bg-[#0A0A0A]) with a hard 1px bottom border (border-[#2A2A2A]). No glassmorphism to maintain maximum clarity.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized to remove standard 'Vercel' look (no soft rounded corners, use rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Primary CTA uses bg-[#FF5500] text-[#EDEDED] hover:bg-[#CC4400].
components.energy_slider: Shadcn Slider primitive. Track styled with a gradient towards #FF5500 to represent cognitive load.
components.task_list: Grid Borders approach. border-collapse style where items have bottom borders (border-b border-[#2A2A2A]) instead of being individual cards.
components.calendar_panel: Shadcn Calendar with customized day cells. Dark mode optimized with #FF5500 indicators for high-velocity days.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select primitives. bg-[#0A0A0A] inputs with strict #2A2A2A borders. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF5500].

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text and border color changes. hover:text-[#EDEDED] hover:border-[#FF5500]
motion_and_interactions.lists: Framer Motion staggered entrance for the Execution Stack. transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Focus states must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF5500]).

icons_and_assets.style: Regular or Light weight for dashboard density. Duotone for empty states.

auth_background.description: Abstract dark texture. Use with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) to serve as a subtle texture for the Login/Auth screen background.

empty_state_texture.description: Close-up of a textured black surface. Use with low opacity (opacity-20) as a background for empty states in the Execution Stack or Velocity Dashboard.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='task-submit-button', data-testid='energy-slider').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA standards. Use text-[#EDEDED] instead of pure white to reduce eye strain in dark mode.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 Swiss & High-Contrast palette. Do NOT introduce standard Tailwind blues/purples.
Build the dashboard using Mode B (Control Room Grid). Ensure h-full is used on grid children so cards match height.
Implement the priority algorithm scoring exactly as requested: S=(U×0.5)+(I×0.3)−(D×0.2).
Use JetBrains Mono for the Velocity Score Dashboard to give a technical, precise feel.
Apply Shadcn UI but override radius to rounded-sm or rounded-none for a sharper 'Control Center' look.
Use the provided Phosphor icons library for all iconography.
Integrate the Auth background image with a dark overlay to prevent distraction.
DO NOT use raw HTML inputs; strictly use Shadcn Form elements.
Ensure the Energy Slider visually reflects cognitive load.
